languages.text: {n}Эоганн качает головой.{/n} "При всем уважении, Вольный Торговец, но это не ваш выбор. Нунциус — моя ответственность, и я сам решу как с ним поступать. Не отнимайте этого у меня. Пора приступать".

{n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "With all due respect, Rogue Trader, this is not your choice. Nuncius is my responsibility, and I will decide for myself what to do with him. Do not deny me this. And now I must begin."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн качает головой.{/n} "При всем уважении, Вольный Торговец, но это не ваш выбор. Нунциус — моя ответственность, и я сам решу как с ним поступать. Не отнимайте этого у меня. Пора приступать".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "With all due respect, Rogue Trader, this is not your choice. Nuncius is my responsibility, and I will decide for myself what to do with him. Do not deny me this. And now I must begin."

{n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "With all due respect, Rogue Trader, this is not your choice. Nuncius is my responsibility, and I will decide for myself what to do with him. Do not deny me this. And now I must begin."

{n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "With all due respect, Rogue Trader, this is not your choice. Nuncius is my responsibility, and I will decide for myself what to do with him. Do not deny me this. And now I must begin."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn niega con la cabeza.{/n} «Con el debido respeto, Comerciante Independiente, la decisión no es suya. Nuncius es responsabilidad mía, y yo mismo decidiré qué hacer con él. Usted no puede privarme de esta potestad. Y ahora, he de comenzar».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "With all due respect, Rogue Trader, this is not your choice. Nuncius is my responsibility, and I will decide for myself what to do with him. Do not deny me this. And now I must begin."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn niega con la cabeza.{/n} «Con el debido respeto, Comerciante Independiente, la decisión no es suya. Nuncius es responsabilidad mía, y yo mismo decidiré qué hacer con él. Usted no puede privarme de esta potestad. Y ahora, he de comenzar».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡摇了摇头。{/n}“恕我直言，行商浪人，这件事不是您能决定的。努恩修斯是我的责任，该怎么处理，我会自己决定。别剥夺我这个权利。现在，我要开始了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "With all due respect, Rogue Trader, this is not your choice. Nuncius is my responsibility, and I will decide for myself what to do with him. Do not deny me this. And now I must begin."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡摇了摇头。{/n}“恕我直言，行商浪人，这件事不是您能决定的。努恩修斯是我的责任，该怎么处理，我会自己决定。别剥夺我这个权利。现在，我要开始了。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn secoue la tête.{/n} « Sauf votre respect, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, ce choix ne vous appartient pas. Nuncius est ma responsabilité et c'est à moi qu'il revient de décider de son sort. Ne m'en privez pas. Sur ce, je dois commencer. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "With all due respect, Rogue Trader, this is not your choice. Nuncius is my responsibility, and I will decide for myself what to do with him. Do not deny me this. And now I must begin."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn secoue la tête.{/n} « Sauf votre respect, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, ce choix ne vous appartient pas. Nuncius est ma responsabilité et c'est à moi qu'il revient de décider de son sort. Ne m'en privez pas. Sur ce, je dois commencer. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Sayısızlık etmem Hür Tacir ama bu seçimi siz yapamazsınız. Nuncius benim sorumluluğumda, ona ne yapacağıma kendim karar vereceğim. Bunu benden esirgemeyin. Artık başlamalıyım."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "With all due respect, Rogue Trader, this is not your choice. Nuncius is my responsibility, and I will decide for myself what to do with him. Do not deny me this. And now I must begin."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Sayısızlık etmem Hür Tacir ama bu seçimi siz yapamazsınız. Nuncius benim sorumluluğumda, ona ne yapacağıma kendim karar vereceğim. Bunu benden esirgemeyin. Artık başlamalıyım."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn schüttelt den Kopf.{/n} "Bei allem Respekt, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, das entscheidet nicht Ihr. Ich bin für Nuncius verantwortlich und werde selbst entscheiden, was mit ihm geschieht. Verwehrt mir das nicht. Und jetzt muss ich anfangen."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "With all due respect, Rogue Trader, this is not your choice. Nuncius is my responsibility, and I will decide for myself what to do with him. Do not deny me this. And now I must begin."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn schüttelt den Kopf.{/n} "Bei allem Respekt, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, das entscheidet nicht Ihr. Ich bin für Nuncius verantwortlich und werde selbst entscheiden, was mit ihm geschieht. Verwehrt mir das nicht. Und jetzt muss ich anfangen."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは首を横に振る。{/n}「失礼ながら、ローグトレーダー、これはあなたの選択ではありません。ヌンキウスは私の責任であり、彼をどうするかは、私が自分で決めます。どうか、それを私から奪わないでください。さあ、私は始めねばなりません」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "With all due respect, Rogue Trader, this is not your choice. Nuncius is my responsibility, and I will decide for myself what to do with him. Do not deny me this. And now I must begin."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは首を横に振る。{/n}「失礼ながら、ローグトレーダー、これはあなたの選択ではありません。ヌンキウスは私の責任であり、彼をどうするかは、私が自分で決めます。どうか、それを私から奪わないでください。さあ、私は始めねばなりません」
